_doc.purpose: Localization companion for nsfw_FertilityMedication.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.

en-us.consumable_medicine_fertility_tooltip:
An oral fertility medication. Encourages the body to mature and release eggs more readily for several days after taking it.
